edges.evidence_quote: The indictment also alleged that Maduro coordinated with the FARC, negotiating multi-ton cocaine shipments and providing weapons to the Colombian guerrilla group.
edges.context: Cartel of the Suns (via Maduro) coordinated with FARC for drug shipments and weapons supply.

edges.evidence_quote: The New York prosecutors accused Maduro of having personally worked and participated in drug trafficking activities with the Mexican Sinaloa, Zeta, and Tren de Aragua cartels.
edges.context: Maduro, as leader of Cartel of the Suns, worked with Sinaloa Cartel in drug trafficking.
